kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09D. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09D" and put them into a temporary table called J09D_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09D_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09D_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09D" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN CITY1 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY2 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY1 = 'Breckerfeld' OR CITY2 = 'Breckerfeld' THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HAUS IN (
        SELECT HAUS
        FROM J09D_temp
        GROUP BY HAUS
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3
    ) THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'

UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN CITY1 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY2 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY1 = 'Breckerfeld' OR CITY2 = 'Breckerfeld' THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09D_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        j."ANLAGE" AS installation,
        j.HAUS,
        j.ANLAGE,
        j.ME_MA_ID,
        j.EQUNR,
        j.HOUSE_NUM1,
        j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
        eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no,
        sm.TITLE AS sm_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS sm_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS sm_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS sm_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS sm_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS sm_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS sm_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS sm_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS sm_EMAIL,
        nm.TITLE AS nm_TITLE, nm.FORENAME AS nm_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME AS nm_SURNAME, nm.STREET AS nm_STREET, nm.STREETNO AS nm_STREETNO, nm.POST_CODE1 AS nm_POST_CODE1, nm.CITY1 AS nm_CITY1, nm.CITY2 AS nm_CITY2, nm.EMAIL AS nm_EMAIL
    FROM J09D_temp j
    LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = j.ANLAGE
    LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
), mandatory_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    base.mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    base.HAUS,
    base.ANLAGE,
    base.ME_MA_ID,
    base.EQUNR,
    base.HOUSE_NUM1,
    'MANDATORY_READING' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_TITLE ELSE base.nm_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_FORENAME ELSE base.nm_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_SURNAME ELSE base.nm_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_STREET ELSE base.nm_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_STREETNO ELSE base.nm_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_POST_CODE1 ELSE base.nm_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_CITY1 ELSE base.nm_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_CITY2 ELSE base.nm_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_EMAIL ELSE base.nm_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM base
JOIN mandatory_eq m ON m.EQUNR = base.EQUNR

WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        j."ANLAGE" AS installation,
        j.HAUS,
        j.ANLAGE,
        j.ME_MA_ID,
        j.EQUNR,
        j.HOUSE_NUM1,
        j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
        eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no,
        sm.TITLE AS sm_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS sm_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS sm_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS sm_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS sm_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS sm_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS sm_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS sm_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS sm_EMAIL,
        nm.TITLE AS nm_TITLE, nm.FORENAME AS nm_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME AS nm_SURNAME, nm.STREET AS nm_STREET, nm.STREETNO AS nm_STREETNO, nm.POST_CODE1 AS nm_POST_CODE1, nm.CITY1 AS nm_CITY1, nm.CITY2 AS nm_CITY2, nm.EMAIL AS nm_EMAIL
    FROM J09D_temp j
    LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = j.ANLAGE
    LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
), direct_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    base.mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    base.HAUS,
    base.ANLAGE,
    base.ME_MA_ID,
    base.EQUNR,
    base.HOUSE_NUM1,
    'DIRECT_MAIL' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_TITLE ELSE base.nm_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_FORENAME ELSE base.nm_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_SURNAME ELSE base.nm_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_STREET ELSE base.nm_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_STREETNO ELSE base.nm_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_POST_CODE1 ELSE base.nm_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_CITY1 ELSE base.nm_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_CITY2 ELSE base.nm_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_EMAIL ELSE base.nm_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM base
JOIN direct_eq d ON d.EQUNR = base.EQUNR

args.email: Please find attached the J09D mandatory reading file for internal processing.

args.sql_query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        j."ANLAGE" AS installation,
        j.HAUS,
        j.ANLAGE,
        j.ME_MA_ID,
        j.EQUNR,
        j.HOUSE_NUM1,
        j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
        eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no,
        sm.TITLE AS sm_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS sm_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS sm_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS sm_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS sm_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS sm_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS sm_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS sm_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS sm_EMAIL,
        nm.TITLE AS nm_TITLE, nm.FORENAME AS nm_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME AS nm_SURNAME, nm.STREET AS nm_STREET, nm.STREETNO AS nm_STREETNO, nm.POST_CODE1 AS nm_POST_CODE1, nm.CITY1 AS nm_CITY1, nm.CITY2 AS nm_CITY2, nm.EMAIL AS nm_EMAIL
    FROM J09D_temp j
    LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = j.ANLAGE
    LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
), mandatory_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
), direct_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    base.mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    base.HAUS,
    base.ANLAGE,
    base.ME_MA_ID,
    base.EQUNR,
    base.HOUSE_NUM1,
    base.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_TITLE ELSE base.nm_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_FORENAME ELSE base.nm_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_SURNAME ELSE base.nm_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_STREET ELSE base.nm_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_STREETNO ELSE base.nm_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_POST_CODE1 ELSE base.nm_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_CITY1 ELSE base.nm_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_CITY2 ELSE base.nm_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN base.sm_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN base.sm_EMAIL ELSE base.nm_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM base
WHERE base.EQUNR NOT IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory_eq)
  AND base.EQUNR NOT IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM direct_eq)

args.email: Please find attached the J09D meter readings export excluding mandatory reading and direct mail cases.
